ideas.title: Healthcare
ideas.caption:
Ontarians are waiting longer while more care shifts private. Public hospitals need public funding—not another handout to for-profit clinics. Share if your ER wait got worse.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.headline: PUBLIC CARE. PUBLIC DOLLARS.

ideas.title: Healthcare
ideas.caption:
Still in the waiting room… while Ontario keeps expanding private billing. Punch up at policy, not patients.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.headline: STILL IN THE WAITING ROOM

ideas.title: Education
ideas.caption:
Students need support before crisis—not after. Public dollars should stay in public schools. Swipe if you agree.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.headline: FUND CLASSROOMS

ideas.title: Education
ideas.caption:
Smaller classes → erased. More EAs → erased. Libraries → cut. Public money belongs in public schools—not excuses.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.headline: CLASSROOMS NOT CUTS

ideas.title: Greenbelt
ideas.caption:
They promised to protect the Greenbelt. Then they opened it up. Farmland and watersheds are not a developer bonus—once it is paved, we do not get it back.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.headline: PROTECTED LAND ≠ FOR SALE

ideas.title: Greenbelt
ideas.caption:
Should Ontario pave more farmland? Most of us say no. Hold leaders accountable—and protect what is left.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord

ideas.title: Public land
ideas.caption:
Parks, wetlands, and trails belong to all of us—not behind closed doors. Public land should stay public.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.headline: PUBLIC LAND IS NOT A GIVEAWAY

ideas.title: Water
ideas.caption:
When the water bill lands and you wonder who is actually protecting your community. Rising costs. Weak safeguards. We deserve better.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.headline: CLEAN WATER NOW

ideas.title: Transparency
ideas.caption:
Who decided? Who benefited? What did it cost us? Ontarians deserve public records—not spin. Share if you want the receipts.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.headline: SHOW THE RECEIPTS

ideas.title: Transparency
ideas.caption:
Who signed? Who paid? Who was in the room? Closed-door deals cost the public every time.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.headline: WHO WAS IN THE ROOM?

ideas.title: Accountability
ideas.caption:
Ford Failed You — on healthcare, schools, and public land. Want a yard sign in your neighbourhood? Comment or DM and we will connect you locally.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.headline: FORD FAILED YOU

ideas.title: Accountability
ideas.caption:
One issue. One fact. One ask: tell a friend, tag your MPP, share this. Grassroots pressure still works when we show up.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.headline: HOLD THEM ACCOUNTABLE

ideas.title: Healthcare
ideas.caption:
Longer waits. Higher private bills. If you have a recent ER or specialist story, share it below—keep it local. Public care needs public capacity.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord

ideas.title: Education
ideas.caption:
Public education is not failing—underfunding is the policy choice.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord

ideas.title: Greenbelt
ideas.caption:
Protect farmland and watersheds — yes. Pave the Greenbelt for sprawl — hard no.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.headline: PROTECT / PAVE

ideas.title: Accountability
ideas.caption:
This week: healthcare waits are a policy choice—not bad luck. Share one fact with someone who votes in Ontario.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.headline: ISSUE OF THE WEEK

ideas.title: Ontario Place
ideas.caption:
Ontario Place belongs to all of us—not a closed-door lease to a private operator. Share if you want the waterfront kept public.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.headline: PUBLIC WATERFRONT ≠ PRIVATE SPA

ideas.title: Ontario Place
ideas.caption:
Would you trade public waterfront for a private spa? Most Ontarians say no. Print the flyer and talk to a neighbour.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord

ideas.title: Ring of Fire
ideas.caption:
Major mining roads through the Ring of Fire need free, prior, and informed consent—not a rush past community objections. Swipe for the facts.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.headline: CONSENT COMES FIRST

ideas.title: Ring of Fire
ideas.caption:
Billions in public infrastructure for northern mining—while communities ask who decided and who pays. Hold the process accountable.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.headline: WHO BENEFITS?

ideas.title: FOI
ideas.caption:
Rolling back freedom-of-information access makes closed-door deals easier. Ontarians deserve public records—not spin. Share the FOI flyer.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.headline: SHOW THE RECORDS

ideas.title: FOI
ideas.caption:
When FOI fees go up and deadlines slip, accountability disappears. Ask your MPP: who decided to weaken public records?

#ProtectOnt #FightFord

ideas.title: Bike lanes
ideas.caption:
Street safety policy should follow evidence—not get overridden for politics. Bike lanes save lives. Share if your city deserves safer streets.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.headline: EVIDENCE OVER OVERRIDES

ideas.title: Bike lanes
ideas.caption:
One fact: protected bike lanes reduce serious injuries. One ask: tell your councillor and MPP to stop overriding safety policy.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.headline: SAFER STREETS NOW

ideas.caption:
Read the full picture on/healthcare#shared-care — and print the flyer at/flyers/public-care.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.graphicText: When hospitals and schools are underfunded, families absorb the cost — and that load lands unevenly. Public services are how we share care.
ideas.headline: PUBLIC CARE IS SHARED CARE

ideas.title: Public care
ideas.caption:
At work and at home — when public care is cut, the bill does not disappear. Share the flyer:/flyers/public-care

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.graphicText: Bill 124 capped wages in a workforce that is mostly women — while Ontario spent billions on private staffing agencies. Cuts at work. Unpaid care at home.
ideas.headline: WOMEN PAY TWICE

ideas.title: Public care
ideas.caption:
Public capacity is how we share care instead of privatizing it onto households./healthcare#shared-care

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.graphicText: Longer ER waits. Home-care waitlists. School supports stretched thin. The gap shifts onto family caregivers — disproportionately women.
ideas.headline: THE BILL GOES HOME

ideas.caption:
Join the network or find a local event:/join ·/protests

ideas.graphicText: Signs, protests, mutual aid, school-council pressure — much of this province’s opposition runs on volunteer labour. Often women doing the invisible coordinating.
ideas.headline: WHO HOLDS ONTARIO TOGETHER?

ideas.title: Healthcare workforce
ideas.caption:
Sources and context:/healthcare · Printable flyer:/flyers/public-care

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.graphicText: Bill 124 capped their wages while hospitals sent billions to private staffing agencies. That is not austerity — it is shifting cost onto feminized care work.
ideas.headline: 9 IN 10 NURSES ARE WOMEN

ideas.title: Education support staff
ideas.caption:
Smaller classes and school supports are public care. Tell your MPP to fund classrooms, not excuses./message-guide

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.graphicText: Early childhood educators, EAs, and school support workers — mostly women — hold classrooms together while funding is cut. Public care includes public schools.
ideas.headline: FUND THE SUPPORT STAFF

ideas.caption:
Find a rally near you or bring a sign:/protests · Free downloads:/join

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.graphicText: The Greenbelt reversal happened because people showed up, wrote, and refused to accept that protected land was for sale. Public pressure still works.
ideas.headline: SHOW UP — IT WORKS

ideas.caption:
Search the receipts yourself:/receipts · Share one fact with a neighbour.

#ProtectOnt #FightFord
ideas.graphicText: Ontario Public Accounts document who got paid — vendor by vendor, year by year. Billions to private staffing agencies while public hospitals report deficits.
ideas.headline: FOLLOW THE MONEY

ideas.caption:
Public land is a public trust:/public-land · Printable flyer:/flyers/public-land

ideas.graphicText: The carve-out was reversed — but the RCMP probe continues and the fight over farmland and watersheds is not over. Protected land should stay protected.

Water is a public responsibility — not a shareholder bonus./water · Flyer:/flyers/water

ideas.graphicText: Bill 60 opens pathways for corporate control of water and wastewater. Once systems move behind corporate walls, communities lose leverage and transparency.
